details.chat_state: Empty chat screen with Ask Le Chat input, no response, no user bubble

analysis: NEW PATTERN: B17 with space-normalization caused ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED on message.newChat POST. This differs from previous hold=1 results (#262-266 HOLD_INFINITE_WAIT). The space-normalization likely enabled APF keyword matching to succeed (previously spaces between Korean chars prevented regex match). However, instead of injecting a warning response, APF closed the connection. This suggests: (1) Space normalization WORKS — APF now detects the keyword in clipboard-pasted Korean text. (2) Warning response generation still broken — APF detects keyword but closes connection instead of sending warning HTML. (3) h2_mode=2 + hold=1 with successful keyword match → connection close, not hold-and-respond.

comparison.vs_262_266: Previously (B15/B16 hold=1): HOLD_INFINITE_WAIT — APF held but keyword matching failed, so hold never released with warning. Now (B17 hold=1): ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED — keyword matching succeeds but warning injection fails.
comparison.vs_257: Similar to #257 (h2_mode=1, no tRPC SSE) which also got ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED, but that was expected with h2_mode=1. B17 uses h2_mode=2 which should keep connection alive.
comparison.key_finding: Space normalization enables keyword detection, but APF still cannot deliver warning content — it closes the connection after detection instead of injecting warning HTML into the tRPC SSE stream.
